title: abies caroliniana
intro: Abies caroliniana, also known as Fraser fir, is a species of evergreen tree native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abies caroliniana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Abies caroliniana can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
